hooks.command: if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "auto: $(date +%Y-%m-%d\ %H:%M)" && git pull --rebase origin master && git push origin master; fi 2>/dev/null || true
if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "auto: $(date +%Y-%m-%d\ %H:%M)" && git pull --rebase origin master && git push origin master; fi 2>/dev/null || true
